overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit night market with red Chinese lanterns, transitioning into a teal-lit underground weapon shop. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with mixed industrial architecture, scattered debris, and various NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market passage beneath hanging red lanterns

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing with rifle near market stall

metal and fabric roof structure covering the market walkway
market stall with various goods on display

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered night market walkway adorned with hanging red paper lanterns. An armed guard stands near a food stall on the right while the camera moves forward through the enclosed concrete passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: market bar area with neon signage

events.description: passing from lantern-lit walkway into open bar area with bright neon arrow sign

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar area with green stools and neon signage

patron sitting on green stool at the bar

long metal counter with bottles and drinks behind it

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered market bar area featuring a prominent blue neon arrow sign. Green stools line the metal counter where a vendor and patrons interact, while the camera continues walking past a freezer unit and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market thoroughfare with clothing stalls

events.description: brighter red neon signage becomes visible including the SHIRTS sign

agents.ego_description: walking through the main market corridor past clothing displays and mannequins

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green pants walking ahead through the market

racks of clothing and apparel for sale
white mannequins modeling clothing near the stall
open-air bar counter with people gathered around

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main market thoroughfare with visible neon signage including a prominent red SHIRTS sign. Mannequins display clothing near stalls while pedestrians walk through the debris-strewn concrete area, and the camera approaches a more open section of the bazaar.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground weapon shop with teal neon lighting

events.description: entering enclosed weapon shop from the open market area
ambient lighting shifts dramatically from warm red tones to cool teal neon

agents.ego_description: entering the weapon shop and examining the firearms on display while walking past the racks

notable_agents.action: shopkeeper in long coat examining weapons on the floor display
customer in red jacket browsing the firearm selection

entered.detail: wall-mounted weapon racks illuminated by bright teal neon strip lights
rows of rifles and firearms laid out on cardboard on the floor
large wooden shipping crate with markings
stacks of ammunition boxes and military supplies

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an underground weapon shop illuminated by intense teal neon lights lining the walls. Rows of firearms are displayed on the floor and mounted on racks while an NPC shopkeeper examines the merchandise. The environment shifts dramatically from the open market to this enclosed, specialized retail space with military crates and ammunition boxes visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit night market that eventually descends into a sterile, teal-illuminated underground armory. It begins by navigating a narrow covered walkway adorned with hanging red paper lanterns and guarded food stalls, moving forward through the enclosed concrete passage. As the camera progresses, the scene opens into a semi-covered bar area marked by a blue neon arrow and green stools, passing by freezer units and scattered debris before emerging into the main market thoroughfare. The environment then expands across a bustling bazaar filled with pedestrians, clothing mannequins, and a prominent red shirts sign, before turning toward a descent into a specialized retail space. Finally, the atmosphere shifts dramatically as the camera enters the underground weapon shop, where the warm market tones are replaced by intense teal neon lights reflecting off rows of firearms, military crates, and ammunition boxes.
